INSERT INTO public.member_emails (

  is_primary,
  is_verified,

  mailing_subscription_status,
  mailing_subscription_source
)
VALUES (
  {{ this.params.member_id }}::uuid,
  lower(NULLIF(btrim({{ this.params.email }}), '')),

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(lower(btrim({{ this.params.first_name || "" }})), '') AS first_name,
    NULLIF(lower(btrim({{ this.params.last_name || "" }})), '') AS last_name,
    NULLIF(lower(btrim({{ this.params.email || "" }})), '') AS email_normalized,
    NULLIF(public.normalize_us_phone({{ this.params.phone || "" }}), '') AS phone_normalized,
    NULLIF({{ this.params.date_of_birth || "" }}, '')::date AS date_of_birth
),
email_matches AS (
  SELECT
    m.member_id,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    m.status,
    'email'::text AS matched_field,
    me.email::text AS matched_value,
    'hard'::text AS match_severity,
    100 AS score,
    'Active email already belongs to this member.'::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.member_emails me
    ON i.email_normalized IS NOT NULL
   AND me.email_normalized = i.email_normalized
   AND COALESCE(me.status, 'active') = 'active'
  JOIN public.members m
    ON m.member_id = me.member_id
   AND m.status = 'active'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    m.member_id,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    m.status,
    'members.email'::text AS matched_field,
    m.email::text AS matched_value,
    'hard'::text AS match_severity,
    95 AS score,
    'Compatibility email cache on an active member matches.'::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.members m
    ON i.email_normalized IS NOT NULL
   AND lower(btrim(m.email)) = i.email_normalized
   AND m.status = 'active'
),
phone_matches AS (
  SELECT
    m.member_id,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    m.status,
    'phone'::text AS matched_field,
    mp.phone::text AS matched_value,
    'warning'::text AS match_severity,
    80 AS score,
    'Phone already exists on an active member; this may be shared, but verify before continuing.'::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.member_phones mp
    ON i.phone_normalized IS NOT NULL
   AND mp.phone_normalized = i.phone_normalized
   AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
  JOIN public.members m
    ON m.member_id = mp.member_id
   AND m.status = 'active'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    m.member_id,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    m.status,
    'members.phone'::text AS matched_field,
    m.phone::text AS matched_value,
    'warning'::text AS match_severity,
    75 AS score,
    'Compatibility phone cache on an active member matches; verify before continuing.'::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.members m
    ON i.phone_normalized IS NOT NULL
   AND public.normalize_us_phone(m.phone) = i.phone_normalized
   AND m.status = 'active'
),
name_matches AS (
  SELECT
    m.member_id,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    m.status,
    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth THEN 'name+dob' ELSE 'name' END::text AS matched_field,
    concat_ws(' ', m.first_name, m.last_name, m.date_of_birth::text)::text AS matched_value,
    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth THEN 'hard' ELSE 'warning' END::text AS match_severity,
    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth THEN 90 ELSE 50 END AS score,
    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth
         THEN 'Active member has the same first name, last name, and date of birth.'
         ELSE 'Active member has the same first and last name; verify before continuing.'
    END::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.members m
    ON i.first_name IS NOT NULL
   AND i.last_name IS NOT NULL
   AND lower(btrim(m.first_name)) = i.first_name
   AND lower(btrim(m.last_name)) = i.last_name
   AND m.status = 'active'
)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_id, matched_field, matched_value)
  member_id,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  email,
  phone,
  status,
  matched_field,
  matched_value,
  match_severity,
  explanation,
  score
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM email_matches
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM phone_matches
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM name_matches
) matches
ORDER BY
  member_id,
  matched_field,
  matched_value,
  CASE WHEN match_severity = 'hard' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  score DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH input AS (

name_matches AS (

    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth THEN 90 ELSE 50 END AS score,
    CASE WHEN i.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL AND m.date_of_birth = i.date_of_birth
         THEN 'Active member has the same first name, last name, and date of birth.'
         ELSE 'Active member has the same first and last name; verify before continuing.'
    END::text AS explanation
  FROM input i
  JOIN public.members m

   AND lower(btrim(m.first_name)) = i.first_name

SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_id, matched_field, matched_value)
  member_id,

FROM (

SELECT member_id, email, first_name, last_name, is_document_reviewer, is_donations_reviewer
FROM public.members
WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ this.params.email }})
  AND is_facilitator IS TRUE
  AND status = 'active'
LIMIT 1;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
    FROM public.member_emails me2
    WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_emails_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
    FROM public.member_phones mp
    WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_phones_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(
      DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
      ' '
    )
    FROM public.member_addresses ma
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_addresses_search,

  concat_ws(' ',
    m.member_id::text,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
      FROM public.member_emails me2
      WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
      FROM public.member_phones mp
      WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(
        DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
        ' '
      )
      FROM public.member_addresses ma
      WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), '')
  ) AS member_search_text,

  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM public.member_agreements ma
    LEFT JOIN public.agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND (
        'sacrament_release' = ANY(COALESCE(at.required_for, ARRAY[]::text[]))
        OR ma.agreement_template_id IS NULL
        OR lower(COALESCE(ma.signature_method, '')) IN ('paper', 'manual', 'documenso')
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed') THEN 0
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature') THEN 1
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('expired', 'rejected', 'canceled', 'cancelled') THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST,

      ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST,
      ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM public.releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  m.status = 'active'
  AND (
    me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.member_facilitators mf
      WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
        AND mf.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        AND mf.status = 'active'
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name NULLS LAST, m.first_name NULLS LAST, m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
    FROM public.member_emails me2
    WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_emails_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
    FROM public.member_phones mp
    WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_phones_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(
      DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
      ' '
    )
    FROM public.member_addresses ma
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_addresses_search,

  concat_ws(' ',
    m.member_id::text,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
      FROM public.member_emails me2
      WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
      FROM public.member_phones mp
      WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(
        DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
        ' '
      )
      FROM public.member_addresses ma
      WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), '')
  ) AS member_search_text,

  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM public.member_agreements ma
    LEFT JOIN public.agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND (
        'sacrament_release' = ANY(COALESCE(at.required_for, ARRAY[]::text[]))
        OR ma.agreement_template_id IS NULL
        OR lower(COALESCE(ma.signature_method, '')) IN ('paper', 'manual', 'documenso')
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed') THEN 0
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature') THEN 1
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('expired', 'rejected', 'canceled', 'cancelled') THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST,
      ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM public.releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  m.status = 'active'
  AND (
    me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.member_facilitators mf
      WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
        AND mf.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        AND mf.status = 'active'
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name NULLS LAST, m.first_name NULLS LAST, m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_donations_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_donations_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
    FROM public.member_emails me2
    WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_emails_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
    FROM public.member_phones mp
    WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_phones_search,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT string_agg(
      DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
      ' '
    )
    FROM public.member_addresses ma
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
  ), '') AS member_addresses_search,

  concat_ws(' ',
    m.member_id::text,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
      FROM public.member_emails me2
      WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
      FROM public.member_phones mp
      WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(
        DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
        ' '
      )
      FROM public.member_addresses ma
      WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), '')
  ) AS member_search_text,

  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM public.member_agreements ma
    LEFT JOIN public.agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND (
        'sacrament_release' = ANY(COALESCE(at.required_for, ARRAY[]::text[]))
        OR ma.agreement_template_id IS NULL
        OR lower(COALESCE(ma.signature_method, '')) IN ('paper', 'manual', 'documenso')
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed') THEN 0
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature') THEN 1
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('expired', 'rejected', 'canceled', 'cancelled') THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST,
      ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM public.releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  m.status = 'active'
  AND (
    me.is_donations_reviewer = TRUE
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.member_facilitators mf
      WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
        AND mf.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        AND mf.status = 'active'
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name NULLS LAST, m.first_name NULLS LAST, m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

ON CONFLICT (email_normalized)

AND NOT EXISTS (

      AND mp.phone_normalized = public.normalize_us_phone(gb.data->>'phone')

  ON CONFLICT (member_id, address_type, address_fingerprint)

    NULLIF(gb.data->>'phone', ''),
    'active',
    'Created from pending Givebutter donation ' || gb.donation_id::text,
    now(),
    now()
  FROM gb
  RETURNING *
),
link_donation AS (
  UPDATE public.donations d
  SET
    member_id = created.member_id,
    status = 'verified',
    reviewed_at = now(),
    reviewer_id = {{ appsmith.store.facilitator_id }}::uuid,
    review_notes = COALESCE(NULLIF({{ this.params.review_notes }}, ''), 'Created member from Givebutter donation')
  FROM created
  WHERE d.donation_id = {{ this.params.donation_id }}::uuid
  RETURNING d.*
),
add_email AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_emails (
    member_id,
    email,
    is_primary,
    is_verified,
    source,
    notes,
		mailing_subscription_status,
		mailing_subscription_source
  )
  SELECT
    created.member_id,
    lower(NULLIF(gb.data->>'email', '')),
    true,
    false,
    'givebutter_create_member',
    'Created from Givebutter donation',
		CASE WHEN COALESCE({{ this.params.subscribe_to_mailing_list }}, true)
			 THEN 'subscribed' ELSE 'not_subscribed' END,
		'givebutter_create_member'
  FROM created
  CROSS JOIN gb
  WHERE NULLIF(gb.data->>'email', '') IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_normalized)
  WHERE email_normalized IS NOT NULL
    AND email_normalized <> ''
    AND status = 'active'
  DO NOTHING
),
add_phone AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_phones (
    member_id,
    phone,
    is_primary,
    is_verified,
    source,
    notes
  )
  SELECT
    created.member_id,
    NULLIF(gb.data->>'phone', ''),
    true,
    false,
    'givebutter_create_member',
    'Created from Givebutter donation'
  FROM created
  CROSS JOIN gb
  WHERE NULLIF(gb.data->>'phone', '') IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public.member_phones mp
    WHERE mp.member_id = created.member_id
      AND mp.phone_normalized = public.normalize_us_phone(gb.data->>'phone')
      AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
  )
),
add_address AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_addresses (
    member_id,
    address_type,
    address_1,
    address_2,
    city,
    state,
    postal_code,
    country,
    is_primary,
    source,
    notes
  )
  SELECT
    created.member_id,
    'home',
    NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,address_1}', ''),
    NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,address_2}', ''),
    NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,city}', ''),
    NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,state}', ''),
    NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,zipcode}', ''),
    COALESCE(NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,country}', ''), 'USA'),
    true,
    'givebutter_create_member',
    'Created from Givebutter donation'
  FROM created
  CROSS JOIN gb
  WHERE NULLIF(gb.data #>> '{address,address_1}', '') IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (member_id, address_type, address_fingerprint)
  WHERE address_fingerprint IS NOT NULL
    AND address_fingerprint <> ''
    AND status = 'active'

    updated_at = now(),

SELECT

  doc_url,
  active,
  created_at,
  updated_at,

  documenso_member_recipient_id,
  documenso_facilitator_recipient_id
FROM public.agreement_templates
ORDER BY name, version DESC;

SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.created_at,
  ma.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  ma.agreement_template_id,
  t.name AS template_name,
  t.version AS template_version,
  ma.status,
  ma.review_notes,
  ma.evidence
FROM public.member_agreements ma
JOIN public.members m ON m.member_id = ma.member_id
LEFT JOIN public.agreement_templates t ON t.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
WHERE ma.status IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature')
ORDER BY ma.created_at ASC
LIMIT 500;

SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.created_at,
  ma.member_id,

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  concat_ws(' ',
    m.member_id::text,
    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.email,
    m.phone,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
      FROM public.member_emails me2
      WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
      FROM public.member_phones mp
      WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(
        DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
        ' '
      )
      FROM public.member_addresses ma
      WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), '')
  ) AS member_search_text,

  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM public.member_agreements ma
    JOIN public.agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(COALESCE(at.required_for, ARRAY[]::text[]))
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed') THEN 0
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature') THEN 1
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('expired', 'rejected', 'canceled', 'cancelled') THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM public.releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  m.status = 'active'
  AND (
    me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE
    OR (
      me.member_id IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.member_facilitators mf
          WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
            AND mf.facilitator_id = me.member_id
            AND mf.status = 'active'
        )
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.member_agreements ma
          WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
            AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        )
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.releases sr
          WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
            AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        )
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name NULLS LAST, m.first_name NULLS LAST, m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

  LIMIT 1
)

  concat_ws(' ',

      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT me2.email, ' ')
      FROM public.member_emails me2
      WHERE me2.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(me2.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT mp.phone, ' ')
      FROM public.member_phones mp
      WHERE mp.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(mp.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), ''),
    COALESCE((
      SELECT string_agg(
        DISTINCT concat_ws(' ', ma.address_1, ma.address_2, ma.city, ma.state, ma.postal_code, ma.country),
        ' '
      )
      FROM public.member_addresses ma
      WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
        AND COALESCE(ma.status, 'active') = 'active'
    ), '')
  ) AS member_search_text,

  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM public.member_agreements ma
    JOIN public.agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(COALESCE(at.required_for, ARRAY[]::text[]))
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed') THEN 0
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('pending_review', 'pending_signature') THEN 1
        WHEN lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('expired', 'rejected', 'canceled', 'cancelled') THEN 2
        ELSE 3
      END,
      ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM public.releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  m.status = 'active'
  AND (
    me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE
    OR (
      me.member_id IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.member_facilitators mf
          WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
            AND mf.facilitator_id = me.member_id
            AND mf.status = 'active'
        )
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.member_agreements ma
          WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
            AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        )
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM public.releases sr
          WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
            AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
        )
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name NULLS LAST, m.first_name NULLS LAST, m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

actionConfiguration.body:
WITH raw_params AS (
  SELECT
    lower(NULLIF({{ this.params?.bucket || 'month' }}, ''))::text AS requested_bucket,

    GREATEST(
      1,
      LEAST(
        COALESCE(NULLIF({{ this.params?.periods || '12' }}, '')::int, 12),
        120
      )
    ) AS requested_periods,

    NULLIF({{ this.params?.start_date || '' }}, '')::timestamptz AS start_override,
    NULLIF({{ this.params?.end_date || '' }}, '')::timestamptz AS end_override,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF({{ this.params?.metric_keys_json || '[]' }}, '')::jsonb,
      '[]'::jsonb
    ) AS metric_keys_json,

    lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})::text AS current_email
),

params AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN requested_bucket IN ('day', 'week', 'month', 'year')
        THEN requested_bucket
      ELSE 'month'
    END AS bucket,

    CASE
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'day' THEN interval '1 day'
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'week' THEN interval '1 week'
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'year' THEN interval '1 year'
      ELSE interval '1 month'
    END AS step,

    CASE
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'day' THEN 'YYYY-MM-DD'
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'week' THEN 'IYYY-"W"IW'
      WHEN requested_bucket = 'year' THEN 'YYYY'
      ELSE 'YYYY-MM'
    END AS label_format,

    requested_periods,
    start_override,
    end_override,
    metric_keys_json,
    current_email
  FROM raw_params
),

me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer,
    COALESCE(is_donations_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_donations_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = (SELECT current_email FROM params)
    AND is_facilitator IS TRUE
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
),

auth AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    me.member_id AS viewer_member_id,
    me.is_document_reviewer,
    me.is_donations_reviewer
  FROM params p
  JOIN me ON TRUE
),

bounds AS (
  SELECT
    bucket,
    step,
    label_format,
    metric_keys_json,

    date_trunc(
      bucket,
      COALESCE(
        start_override,
        date_trunc(bucket, now()) - ((requested_periods - 1) * step)
      )
    ) AS start_ts,

    date_trunc(
      bucket,
      COALESCE(end_override, now())
    ) + step AS exclusive_end_ts
  FROM auth
),

buckets AS (
  SELECT
    gs AS bucket_start,
    gs + b.step AS bucket_end,
    b.label_format
  FROM bounds b
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
    b.start_ts,
    b.exclusive_end_ts - b.step,
    b.step
  ) AS gs
),

scoped_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    m.member_id
  FROM public.members m
  CROSS JOIN auth a
  WHERE lower(COALESCE(m.status, 'active')) = 'active'
    AND (
      a.is_document_reviewer IS TRUE
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_facilitators mf
        WHERE mf.member_id = m.member_id
          AND mf.facilitator_id = a.viewer_member_id
          AND mf.status = 'active'
      )
    )
),

selected_metrics AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT 'agreements_signed'::text AS metric_key, 'Agreements signed'::text AS metric_label, 10 AS sort_order
    UNION ALL SELECT 'releases_sent', 'Releases sent', 20
    UNION ALL SELECT 'donations_count', 'Donations received', 30
    UNION ALL SELECT 'donations_dollars', 'Donation dollars', 40
    UNION ALL SELECT 'members_created', 'Members created', 50
  ) m
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE jsonb_array_length(b.metric_keys_json) = 0
     OR m.metric_key IN (
       SELECT value::text
       FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(b.metric_keys_json)
     )
),

agreement_counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.bucket_start,
    'agreements_signed'::text AS metric_key,
    COUNT(ma.member_agreement_id)::numeric AS value
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN public.member_agreements ma
    ON ma.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM scoped_members)
   AND lower(COALESCE(ma.status, '')) IN ('signed', 'complete', 'completed')
   AND COALESCE(ma.signed_at, ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at) >= b.bucket_start
   AND COALESCE(ma.signed_at, ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at) < b.bucket_end
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
),

release_counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.bucket_start,
    'releases_sent'::text AS metric_key,
    COUNT(r.release_id)::numeric AS value
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN public.releases r
    ON r.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM scoped_members)
   AND COALESCE(r.released_at, r.created_at) >= b.bucket_start
   AND COALESCE(r.released_at, r.created_at) < b.bucket_end
   AND lower(COALESCE(r.status, 'issued')) <> 'voided'
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
),

donation_counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.bucket_start,
    'donations_count'::text AS metric_key,
    COUNT(d.donation_id)::numeric AS value
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN public.donations d
    ON d.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM scoped_members)
   AND COALESCE(d.donated_at, d.created_at) >= b.bucket_start
   AND COALESCE(d.donated_at, d.created_at) < b.bucket_end
   AND lower(COALESCE(d.status, '')) IN ('verified', 'imported', 'pending_review')
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
),

donation_dollars AS (
  SELECT
    b.bucket_start,
    'donations_dollars'::text AS metric_key,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.amount_cents), 0)::numeric / 100.0 AS value
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN public.donations d
    ON d.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM scoped_members)
   AND COALESCE(d.donated_at, d.created_at) >= b.bucket_start
   AND COALESCE(d.donated_at, d.created_at) < b.bucket_end
   AND lower(COALESCE(d.status, '')) IN ('verified', 'imported', 'pending_review')
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
),

member_counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.bucket_start,
    'members_created'::text AS metric_key,
    COUNT(m.member_id)::numeric AS value
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN public.members m
    ON m.member_id IN (SELECT member_id FROM scoped_members)
   AND m.created_at >= b.bucket_start
   AND m.created_at < b.bucket_end
   AND lower(COALESCE(m.status, 'active')) <> 'deleted'
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
),

all_metric_values AS (
  SELECT * FROM agreement_counts
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM release_counts
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM donation_counts
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM donation_dollars
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM member_counts
)

SELECT
  mv.bucket_start,
  to_char(mv.bucket_start, b.label_format) AS bucket_label,
  mv.metric_key,
  sm.metric_label,
  sm.sort_order,
  mv.value
FROM all_metric_values mv
JOIN selected_metrics sm
  ON sm.metric_key = mv.metric_key
CROSS JOIN bounds b
ORDER BY mv.bucket_start, sm.sort_order;
